name: rate_type_with_independent_denominator_params
description: Verify that rate_type_column_params override works when toggle is off
expected_query: with "t6ea243dfce995f8b29040a634e891127" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."psr_pid" as "pid", SUM(CASE WHEN psr_pid IS NOT NULL AND (sk IS NULL OR sk = false) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rate_type_total_count from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."dwn" in (1, 2) and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) group by "nfl_plays"."psr_pid"), "rate_aggregate_a11bad303f0a" as materialized (select nfl_plays.trg_pid AS pid, SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS measure_total from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2023_PRE_WEEK_1', '2023_PRE_WEEK_2', '2023_PRE_WEEK_3', '2023_PRE_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_1', '2023_REG_WEEK_2', '2023_REG_WEEK_3', '2023_REG_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_5', '2023_REG_WEEK_6', '2023_REG_WEEK_7', '2023_REG_WEEK_8', '2023_REG_WEEK_9', '2023_REG_WEEK_10', '2023_REG_WEEK_11', '2023_REG_WEEK_12', '2023_REG_WEEK_13', '2023_REG_WEEK_14', '2023_REG_WEEK_15', '2023_REG_WEEK_16', '2023_REG_WEEK_17', '2023_REG_WEEK_18', '2023_POST_WEEK_1', '2023_POST_WEEK_2', '2023_POST_WEEK_3', '2023_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."targeted_receiver_separation" in ('OPEN', 'WIDE_OPEN') group by nfl_plays.trg_pid) select "player"."pid", CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_a11bad303f0a.measure_total) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t6ea243dfce995f8b29040a634e891127.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS trg_from_plays_0, "player"."pos" from "player" left join "t6ea243dfce995f8b29040a634e891127" on "t6ea243dfce995f8b29040a634e891127"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "rate_aggregate_a11bad303f0a" on "rate_aggregate_a11bad303f0a"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
